ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_items" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the media item */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the media item in seconds */,
  "audio_url" TEXT /* URL for the audio file */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL for the video file */,
  "display_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the media item is displayed */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album to which the media item belongs */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the media file (e.g., MP3, WAV, MP4) */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL for the thumbnail image of the media item */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the media item for categorization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the media item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the media item was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the media item */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the media item has been viewed */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of times the media item has been downloaded */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the media item (e.g., Creative Commons, Copyright) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_items_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_items_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the album content */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL for the cover art image of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album (e.g., Pop, Rock, Classical) */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of all media items in the album in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the album */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the album has been viewed */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of times the album has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, editor, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL for the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media item being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the media item */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the media item was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access event occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_access_logs_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_items ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing a list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
